fato_historico: 1995: On the Caribbean island of Montserrat, the Soufrière Hills volcano erupts. Over the course of several years, it devastates the island, destroying the capital, forcing most of the population to flee.
energia_do_dia: Today, you may feel a powerful surge of intensity bubbling beneath your surface, much like the transformative energy of a volcanic shift. It is a good time to channel this fervor into creative projects. Consider how your fiery passion can reshape your world, turning obstacles into fertile soil for new, beautiful beginnings to bloom in your life.
frase_do_dia: Your inner light is powerful enough to rebuild any path you choose today.
significado_numero: Represents the inner strength required to manifest your deepest personal desires.
conselho: Focus your vibrant energy on construction rather than destruction today.
